The recording is apparently from March 19th.

claim: Ein unscharfer Schwarz-Weiß-Film aus DDR-Zeiten sorgt im Internet für Spekulationen über Angela Merkel. Man sieht mehrere schunkelnde und klatschende Männer und Frauen - laut Begleittext angeblich die «DDR-Führung» und die heutige Bundeskanzlerin bei einem Konzert im Jahr 1987
claim_en: A fuzzy black and white film from GDR times is causing speculation about Angela Merkel on the Internet. You can see several men and women swaying and clapping - according to the accompanying text, supposedly the "GDR leadership" and today's Chancellor at a concert in 1987

claim: Ein Kettenbrief zum neuartigen Coronavirus geistert seit Wochen durch die sozialen Netzwerke. Mal heißt es darin, die Ratschläge kämen von "Experten aus Taiwan" oder einem "italienischen Arzt" aus der chinesischen Stadt Shenzhen; mal sind es ein "Krankenhaus-Chefarzt & Stationsleitung", die Stadt Wien oder die UN-Kinderhilfsorganisation Unicef. Der Kettenbrief wird in mehreren Versionen in verschiedenen Sprachen geteilt. Kern des Textes ist oft die Behauptung, der Erreger Sars-CoV-2 sterbe bei 26 bis 27 Grad Celsius ab.
claim_en: A chain letter about the new type of corona virus has been haunting social networks for weeks. Sometimes it says that the advice comes from "experts from Taiwan" or an "Italian doctor" from the Chinese city of Shenzhen; sometimes it is a "hospital chief physician & ward management", the city of Vienna or the UN children's aid organization Unicef. The chain letter is divided into several versions in different languages. The core of the text is often the claim that the Sars-CoV-2 pathogen dies at 26 to 27 degrees Celsius.

claim: In den sozialen Netzwerken wird behauptet, der Attentäter von Halle, Stephan B., sei nicht in Deutschland geboren worden. Mehrere Nutzer schreiben auf Facebook, es habe dort bis vor Kurzem ein Profil mit dem Namen des Attentäters gegeben. Er sei überwiegend mit Arabisch sprechenden Usern befreundet gewesen. Es wird daher spekuliert, der Täter sei ein 2015 nach Deutschland gekommener Araber. Andere schreiben, der wirkliche Name des Attentäters sei «Hafid Harouri», er sei im Iran geboren.
claim_en: In the social networks it is claimed that the assassin in Halle, Stephan B., was not born in Germany. Several users write on Facebook that until recently there was a profile there with the name of the assassin. He was mostly friends with Arabic-speaking users. It is therefore speculated that the perpetrator was an Arab who came to Germany in 2015. Others write that the real name of the assassin is "Hafid Harouri" and that he was born in Iran.

claim: Die Hypothese kam fast zeitgleich mit dem Erreger auf: Das neuartige Coronavirus sei gar nicht natürlichen Ursprungs, wird behauptet, sondern menschengemacht - als eine Art Biowaffe. Einer am 8. April veröffentlichten Umfrage zufolge glaubt zum Beispiel fast jeder dritte erwachsene US-Amerikaner, der Erreger sei absichtlich im Labor gezüchtet worden.
claim_en: The hypothesis came up almost at the same time as the pathogen: The novel coronavirus is not of natural origin, it is claimed, but man-made - as a kind of bioweapon. According to a survey published on April 8, for example, almost one in three American adults believes that the pathogen was purposely grown in a laboratory.

claim: „Australien: Brandstiftung statt Klimawandel“
claim_en: "Australia: arson instead of climate change"

claim: In einem Post wird behauptet, die Feuer in Australien seien von Menschen gelegt und geschürt worden. Es wird suggeriert, dass die Regierung hierfür verantwortlich sei. Der Beitrag legt den Schluss nahe, dass durch die angebliche Brandstiftung Landflächen gewonnen werden sollen, um dort eine Zugverbindung für das "Projekt Clara" zu errichten.
claim_en: One post alleged that the fires in Australia were started and fanned by humans. It is suggested that the government is responsible for this. The article suggests that the alleged arson is intended to gain land in order to build a train connection for the "Project Clara".

claim: Kontaktsperren und Ausgangsbeschränkungen wegen des neuartigen Coronavirus halten manche für überzogen. Der 2012 emeritierte Mikrobiologie-Professor Sucharit Bhakdi etwa nennt sie sinnlos. Er sagt in seinem Video vom 19. März 2020, Sars-CoV-2 sei "nicht grundsätzlich" gefährlicher als andere Erreger der Virus-Familie. Von 10 000 Infizierten seien "lediglich 50 bis 60" erkrankt. "99 Prozent der Menschen haben keine oder nur leichte Symptome." Mit Blick auf staatliche Maßnahmen zur Eindämmung des Virus sagt Bhakdi: "Ich finde sie grotesk, überbordend und direkt gefährlich"
claim_en: Some consider bans on contacts and exit restrictions due to the novel corona virus to be excessive. Sucharit Bhakdi, emeritus professor of microbiology in 2012, calls it pointless. In his video from March 19, 2020, he says that Sars-CoV-2 is "not fundamentally" more dangerous than other pathogens in the virus family. Of 10,000 people infected, "only 50 to 60" are sick. "99 percent of people have no or only mild symptoms." Regarding government measures to contain the virus, Bhakdi says: "I find them grotesque, exuberant and directly dangerous"

claim: Der "Klimaschwindel" sei "in sich zusammengebrochen", behauptet das Portal "pravda-tv.com" mit Blick unter anderem auf einen Artikel finnischer Wissenschaftler. "Neue wissenschaftliche Erkenntnisse zeigen, dass menschliches Handeln praktisch keinen Einfluss auf die globalen Temperaturen hat", heißt es
claim_en: The "climate fraud" has "collapsed", claims the portal "pravda-tv.com" with a view to, among other things, an article by Finnish scientists. "New scientific findings show that human activity has practically no influence on global temperatures," it says

claim: Der «Mythos des menschengemachten Klimawandels» soll «an allen Ecken und Enden» zusammenbrechen, wird in einem Artikel auf der Internetseite «sciencefiles.org» behauptet. Als Grundlage für die Behauptung wird eine neue Studie zweier finnischer Wissenschaftler angeführt
claim_en: The "myth of man-made climate change" is supposed to collapse "at every nook and cranny", claims an article on the "sciencefiles.org" website. A new study by two Finnish scientists is cited as the basis for the claim

claim: Nachdem der Verfassungsschutz die Identitäre Bewegung in Deutschland als rechtsextremistisch eingestuft hat, werfen einige dem Inlandsgeheimdienst vor, er habe damit das «Grundgesetz für verfassungsfeindlich» erklärt. In einem auf mehreren Portalen veröffentlichten Beitrag behauptet etwa die frühere DDR-Bürgerrechtlerin Vera Lengsfeld, künftig sei «rechtsextrem, wer es wagt, auf die Einhaltung des Grundgesetzes zu bestehen»
claim_en: After the Office for the Protection of the Constitution classified the Identitarian Movement in Germany as right-wing extremist, some accuse the domestic secret service of having declared the “Basic Law to be unconstitutional”. In a post published on several portals, for example, the former GDR civil rights activist Vera Lengsfeld claims that in future "right-wing extremists will be those who dare to insist on compliance with the Basic Law"

claim: Monate nach dem Ende eines Gerichtsverfahrens in Kanada macht im Netz noch immer die Behauptung die Runde, US-Klimaforscher Michael E. Mann habe einen Prozess verloren. Die von Mann entwickelte "Hockeyschläger-Kurve", die die gegenwärtige globale Erwärmung beschreibt, sei als Fälschung entlarvt: "Gerichtsurteil stürzt CO2-Papst vom Thron", heißt es. Oder auch: "Peinlicher Rückschlag für bekannten Klimaforscher". Und sogar: "Gericht entlarvt Lüge vom menschengemachten Klimawandel".
claim_en: Months after the end of legal proceedings in Canada, claims are still making the rounds online that US climate researcher Michael E. Mann has lost a lawsuit. The "hockey stick curve" developed by Mann, which describes the current global warming, has been exposed as a fake: "Court ruling overthrows the CO2 pope from his throne," they say. Or also: "An embarrassing setback for well-known climate researchers". And even: "Court exposes lies about man-made climate change".

claim: Von Impfstoffen gegen Masern soll eine größere Gefahr ausgehen als von der Krankheit selbst. Das behauptet ein Text, der sich auf verschiedenen Seiten im Internet findet. Innerhalb von 10 Jahren seien demnach über 100 Menschen in Folge einer Masern-Impfung gestorben, an der Krankheit selbst jedoch niemand. Der Text bezieht sich auf Daten einer US-amerikanischen Behörde. Maserninfektionen seien zwar rückläufig, aber nicht wegen der Impfungen, sondern wegen besserer Hygiene und Ernährung
claim_en: Measles vaccines are said to pose a greater risk than the disease itself. This is what a text claims that can be found on various sites on the Internet. According to this, over 100 people died within 10 years as a result of a measles vaccination, but nobody from the disease itself. The text refers to data from a US agency. Measles infections are declining, but not because of the vaccinations, but because of better hygiene and nutrition

claim: Ratschläge und Gerüchte zum Einfluss bestimmter Medikamente auf eine Coronavirus-Infektion sorgen derzeit für Verunsicherung. In sozialen Netzwerken verbreitete sich eine Nachricht, der zufolge Ibuprofen die Vermehrung von Coronaviren begünstige. Dies hätten Forscher der Uniklinik Wien herausgefunden, hieß es
claim_en: Advice and rumors about the influence of certain drugs on a coronavirus infection are currently causing uncertainty. News spread on social networks that ibuprofen was promoting the spread of coronaviruses. This is what researchers at the University Clinic in Vienna found out, it said

claim: Die Stadt Bergamo im Norden Italiens ist eine der am stärksten von der Corona-Pandemie betroffenen Kommunen. In einem Kettenbrief, der auf WhatsApp und Facebook geteilt wird, heißt es, an nur einem Tag seien dort 800 Menschen an Covid-19 gestorben. Über das italienische Lied "Rinascerò, Rinascerai" des Sängers Roby Facchinetti steht dort, dessen Urheberrechte seien an das Krankenhaus in Bergamo überschrieben worden. Und weiter: "Jeder Klick auf das Video ist damit quasi eine Spende, da YouTube dem Inhaber Geld pro Klick bezahlt."
claim_en: The city of Bergamo in northern Italy is one of the communities hardest hit by the corona pandemic. A chain letter shared on WhatsApp and Facebook said that 800 people died of Covid-19 in just one day. It says about the Italian song "Rinascerò, Rinascerai" by the singer Roby Facchinetti, whose copyrights have been transferred to the Bergamo hospital. And further: "Every click on the video is a kind of donation, as YouTube pays the owner money per click."

The corona virus is large in size with a cell diameter of 400-500 micro, so any mask prevents its entry so there is no need to exploit pharmacists to trade with muzzles.

The virus does not settle in the air, but on the ground, so it is not transmitted by the air.

The corona virus, when it falls on a metal surface, will live for 12 hours, so washing hands with soap and water well will do the trick.

Corona virus when it falls on fabrics stays for 9 hours so washing clothes or exposing them to the sun for two hours is enough for the purpose of killing him.

The virus lives on the hands for 10 minutes so putting the alcohol sanitizer in the pocket is enough for the purpose of prevention.

If the virus is exposed to a temperature of 26-27°C, it will be killed, it does not live in hot areas. Also drinking hot water and exposure to the sun is good enough.
Stay away from ice cream and cold food is important.

Gargling with warm water and salt kills tonsils and prevents them from leaking into the lungs.

Adhering to these instructions is sufficient to prevent the virus.

The corona virus, when it falls on a metal surface, will live for 12 hours, so washing hands with soap and water well will do the trick.

Corona virus when it falls on fabrics stays for 9 hours so washing clothes or exposing them to the sun for two hours is enough for the purpose of killing him.

The virus lives on the hands for 10 minutes so putting the alcohol sanitizer in the pocket is enough for the purpose of prevention.

If the virus is exposed to a temperature of 26-27°C, it will be killed, it does not live in hot areas. Also drinking hot water and exposure to the sun is good enough.
Stay away from ice cream and cold food is important.

Gargling with warm water and salt kills tonsils and prevents them from leaking into the lungs.

Adhering to these instructions is sufficient to prevent the virus.

claim: “Analisando os números do país em 2019, temos que a soma de mortes por Pneumonia (36.732), Insuficiência Respiratória (16.568) e SARGS (228), todas confundíveis com a Covid-19, resulta em: 53.528. Agora, a mesma soma em 2020, Pneumonia (29.459), Insuficiência Respiratória (14.147) e SARGS (2.392), nos dá: 45.998. Ou seja, de um ano para o outro, a diferença entre mortos por causas respiratórias cujos sintomas são semelhantes com os da Covid-19 é: 7.530. Basicamente o número de óbitos atribuídos ao coronavírus (6.932)”
claim_en: “Analyzing the numbers for the country in 2019, we have that the sum of deaths from Pneumonia (36,732), Respiratory Failure (16,568) and SARGS (228), all confused with Covid-19, results in: 53,528. Now, the same sum in 2020, Pneumonia (29,459), Respiratory Failure (14,147) and SARGS (2,392), gives us: 45,998. In other words, from one year to the next, the difference between deaths from respiratory causes whose symptoms are similar to those of Covid-19 is: 7,530. Basically the number of deaths attributed to the coronavirus (6,932)"

claim: “As vacinas da AstraZeneca, feita pela [Universidade de] Oxford e com a Fiocruz; e a vacina da Janssen (...) usam outra estratégia. Eles pegaram um vírus que normalmente infecta a gente, que se chama adenovírus. Esse adenovírus foi manipulado dentro do laboratório e um pedacinho do material genético do vírus que causa a Covid-19 veio para dentro desse adenovírus. Então a vacina injeta dentro do nosso corpo um vírus que foi manipulado num laboratório, e esse vírus leva um pedacinho do coronavírus. Em resposta à vacina, a gente também produz anticorpo e [resposta das] células”
claim_en: “AstraZeneca's vaccines, made by [University of] Oxford and Fiocruz; and the Janssen vaccine (...) use another strategy. They caught a virus that normally infects us, called adenovirus. This adenovirus was manipulated inside the laboratory and a little bit of the genetic material from the virus that causes Covid-19 came into this adenovirus. So the vaccine injects into our body a virus that has been manipulated in a laboratory, and this virus takes a little piece of the coronavirus. In response to the vaccine, we also produce antibody and [response from] cells"

What will be the background of the curfew order across India on March 22?

After 14 hours we will have a much safer country to get to!

claim: As vacinas da COVID não seguiram os protocolos normais e reações adversas tem ocorrido. Excluir da sociedade quem não se sujeitar a tomá-la é, além de precipitado, contra a liberdade. Mesmo q eu esteja tendente a me vacinar não posso obrigar outros a fazê-lo. Não posso me responsabilizar por essas reações adversas, a vacinação tem que ser uma decisão de cada um. Além disso, a Revolta da Vacina no Rio de Janeiro no início do século XX já nos ensinou que obrigar uma vacinação não termina bem. Por fim, a vacina traz uma proteção individual. Ainda que outras pessoas não a tomem isso não interfere na imunização de quem tomou.
claim_en: COVID vaccines did not follow normal protocols and adverse reactions have occurred. Excluding from society those who are not subject to taking it is, in addition to being rash, against freedom. Even if I tend to get vaccinated, I cannot force others to do so. I can't be responsible for these adverse reactions, vaccination has to be a decision for everyone. Furthermore, the Vaccine Revolt in Rio de Janeiro at the beginning of the 20th century already taught us that forcing a vaccination does not end well. Finally, the vaccine provides individual protection. Even if other people do not take it, it does not interfere with the immunization of the person who took it.
